reasons.win_strait_open: The Strait of Hormuz has been open and stable for 7 consecutive days. Crisis resolved through [masterful diplomacy / strong leadership / persistent strategy].
reasons.win_day91_stable: After 13 weeks of crisis management, the situation has stabilized enough for a diplomatic resolution.
reasons.lose_approval: Congress has initiated removal proceedings. Your approval collapsed to [X]% and stayed there. Your time in the Situation Room is over.
reasons.lose_assassination_extreme: Despite warnings, the threat was not contained. A sophisticated attack succeeds. The crisis claims its highest-profile casualty.
reasons.lose_international: The international community has turned against you. Allies recall ambassadors. Sanctions against the United States are being discussed. You are a global pariah.
reasons.lose_polarization: Domestic unrest has reached a breaking point. The military is split. The crisis abroad has ignited a crisis at home. Civil order collapses.
reasons.lose_war: Too many unresolved military incidents. The escalation spiral is irreversible. Armed conflict erupts in the Strait of Hormuz. A regional war has begun.
reasons.lose_day91_unstable: After 13 weeks, the situation remains unstable. You failed to open the strait.
